initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    i_category,
    s_store_name,
    d_quarter,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
    JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
    JOIN household_demographics ON customer.c_current_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
WHERE 
    household_demographics.hd_dep_count = 4
    AND store.s_store_name = 'ese'
    AND date_dim.d_year = 2001
    AND store_sales.ss_sold_time_sk IN (
        SELECT t_time_sk 
        FROM time_dim 
        WHERE t_hour = 8 AND t_minute >= 30
    )
GROUP BY 
    i_category,
    s_store_name,
    d_quarter
ORDER BY 
    i_category,
    s_store_name,
    d_quarter
LIMIT 100;
initial_candidates.exec_error:
Binder Error: Referenced column "d_quarter" not found in FROM clause!
Candidate bindings: "d_quarter_seq", "d_quarter_name", "d_fy_quarter_seq", "d_date", "d_current_day"
